title: Automation Usage Limit
excerpt: I noticed that one month I exceeded my Usage Limit a bit and that excess was reduced from the following month’s limit.  Is it fair to assume that if I do not reach my limit in one month that the difference will be added …

posts.author: GiovanniSmith (Giovanni Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: I noticed that one month I exceeded my Usage Limit a bit and that excess was reduced from the following month’s limit. Is it fair to assume that if I do not reach my limit in one month that the difference will be added to the following month too.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@GiovanniSmith

No, overages are deducted from the following month. If your limit is 25,000 that is the most each month will start with.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)

posts.author: GiovanniSmith (Giovanni Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jim

I have the STANDARD version with a limit of 250 per month. Cannot quite afford the PRO as yet

Giovanni Smith
